effect.name: Merry Christmas Big Grid
effect.settings: CopyFormat1 0 2 1 0 19 PASTE_BY_CELL Text E_CHECKBOX_TextToCenter=0,E_CHECKBOX_Text_PixelOffsets=0,E_CHOICE_Text_Count=none,E_CHOICE_Text_Dir=none,E_CHOICE_Text_Effect=normal,E_FONTPICKER_Text_Font=bold 'segoe ui' 16 windows-1252,E_SLIDER_Text_XEnd=0,E_SLIDER_Text_XStart=0,E_SLIDER_Text_YEnd=0,E_SLIDER_Text_YStart=25,E_TEXTCTRL_Text=Merry,E_TEXTCTRL_Text_Speed=10 C_BUTTON_Palette1=#FFFFFF,C_BUTTON_Palette2=#FF0000,C_BUTTON_Palette3=#00FF00,C_BUTTON_Palette4=#0000FF,C_BUTTON_Palette5=#FFFF00,C_BUTTON_Palette6=#000000,C_CHECKBOX_Palette2=1 87700 88450 2 -1000 19 21 98 100 Text E_CHECKBOX_TextToCenter=0,E_CHECKBOX_Text_PixelOffsets=0,E_CHOICE_Text_Count=none,E_CHOICE_Text_Dir=none,E_CHOICE_Text_Effect=normal,E_FONTPICKER_Text_Font=bold 'segoe ui' 16 windows-1252,E_SLIDER_Text_XEnd=0,E_SLIDER_Text_XStart=0,E_SLIDER_Text_YEnd=0,E_SLIDER_Text_YStart=-14,E_TEXTCTRL_Text=Christmas,E_TEXTCTRL_Text_Speed=10 C_BUTTON_Palette1=#FFFFFF,C_BUTTON_Palette2=#FF0000,C_BUTTON_Palette3=#00FF00,C_BUTTON_Palette4=#0000FF,C_BUTTON_Palette5=#FFFF00,C_BUTTON_Palette6=#000000,C_CHECKBOX_Palette3=1 87700 88450 3 70900 19 21 98 100
